mapper.sql: t.id, t.vehicle_assignment_id, t.order_id, t.assignment_type, t.vehicle_source_type, t.vin, t.vehicle_id, t.assign_status, t.manual_assign_flag, t.manual_assign_reason, t.unbind_reason, t.occupy_expire_time, t.assign_time, t.bind_time, t.release_time, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_vehicle_assignment t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_vehicle_assignment t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_vehicle_assignment t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_vehicle_assignment ( vehicle_assignment_id, order_id, assignment_type, vehicle_source_type, vin, vehicle_id, assign_status, manual_assign_flag, manual_assign_reason, unbind_reason, occupy_expire_time, assign_time, bind_time, release_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{vehicleAssignmentId}, #{orderId}, #{assignmentType}, #{vehicleSourceType}, #{vin}, #{vehicleId}, #{assignStatus}, #{manualAssignFlag}, #{manualAssignReason}, #{unbindReason}, #{occupyExpireTime}, #{assignTime}, #{bindTime}, #{releaseTime}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_vehicle_assignment ( vehicle_assignment_id, order_id, assignment_type, vehicle_source_type, vin, vehicle_id, assign_status, manual_assign_flag, manual_assign_reason, unbind_reason, occupy_expire_time, assign_time, bind_time, release_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.vehicleAssignmentId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.assignmentType}, #{item.vehicleSourceType}, #{item.vin}, #{item.vehicleId}, #{item.assignStatus}, #{item.manualAssignFlag}, #{item.manualAssignReason}, #{item.unbindReason}, #{item.occupyExpireTime}, #{item.assignTime}, #{item.bindTime}, #{item.releaseTime}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_vehicle_assignment t SET
t.assign_status = #{assignStatus},
t.vin = #{vin},
t.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId},
t.bind_time = #{bindTime},
t.release_time = #{releaseTime},
t.unbind_reason = #{unbindReason},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_vehicle_assignment t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
